name: All About, Inc.
summary: All About, Inc. engages in the Internet advertising business. It is also involved in the portal site operation, sampling, and learning business. In addition, the company engages in the operation of Facebook navi, a social media related business; citrus, a decentralized media platform; Tsui Navi, a Twitter navigation site; and DL market, a platform for buying and selling digital contents. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
